records.ety: [L., a whip. See Flagellate, v. t.]

defs: A young, flexible shoot of a plant; esp., the long trailing branch of a vine, or a slender branch in certain mosses.
A long, whiplike cilium. See Flagellata.
An appendage of the reproductive apparatus of the snail.
A lashlike appendage of a crustacean, esp. the terminal portion of the antennæ and the epipodite of the maxilipeds. See Maxilliped.
